rulings.Case Title: EST. OF MAYBELLE WOO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/14/2020: The following issues must be addressed: 1) The supplemental declaration (filed 02/28/2020) did not respond to item 1F of the assigned examiner's notes (emailed 02/07/2020) as to the issue of whether the petitioner's governing instrument or applicable statute authorizes the petitioner to act as personal representative of the estate. 2) The address of Rhonda Farrar listed in the proof of service (filed 03/02/2020) is different from the address listed in the Declaration of Completion of Probate re Estate of Suelyn Wong (Exhibit A to the supplemental declaration). Also, the last name is "Ferrar" according to the Declaration of Competion of Probate, while the proof of service refers to "Farrar". 3) Did Gloria Woo leave a pour-over will naming the trustee of the Chadwick and Gloria F. Woo Family Trust as the sole beneficiary? If so, has the will be admitted to probate and any person appointed as personal representative of Gloria's estate? 4) Has Bradley Wong been discharged as personal representative of Suelyn's estate? If so, does he intend to petition for reappointment for subsequent administration of the estate to receive Suelyn's share?

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEANNE D. O'DONNELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/21/2020 (no earlier date available). The following issues must be addressed: 1) The furniture, furnishings, and personal items listed in the partial inventory and appraisal (filed 09/11/2017) must be appraised by the referee. 2) Did the petitioner give notice of administration to any public entity (other than the Franchise Tax Board) pursuant to Probate Code sections 9201 & 9202? 3) The hearing date set forth in paragraph 3 of the report appears incorrect. Did the petitioner mean the hearing held on 12/17/2019? 4) The final inventory and appraisal (filed 11/07/2019) must be corrected to show each asset in existence as of the date of the decedent's death. The description "right to receive distribution from the estate of Karen O'Donnell" is insufficient. The probate referee should be instructed accordingly. 5) The personal representative of Karen O'Donnell's estate must be served with notice of hearing of the report. A supplemental proof of service must be filed. 6) No update has been provided as to the decedent's real property in Pennsylvania. 7) Did Karen O'Donnell leave any surviving issue? If so, they must be served with notice of hearing of the report, and a supplemental proof of service must be filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROWENA K. WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/05/2020. Issues: 1) Examiner does not have the required courtesy copy of the Amended Petition. File stamped single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 no later than 2pm on 04/28/20 at the Superior Court. (LRSF 2.7, 14.6). 2) Notice of the hearing was not given 15 days before the hearing. Matter continue to provide proper notice. 3) Unclear if a updated proposed order is needed for the amended petition. A hard copy of the proposed order must be received by Examiner in room 202 no later than 2pm on 04/28/20 at the Superior Court. (LRSF 14.93). [Proposed orders may not be e-filed.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTOPHER JOSHUA GORECKI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/07/2020. The following issues must be addressed: 1) No declaration of real property is on file. See LRSF 14.27(C). 2) A supplement signed and verified by the petitioner must be filed to address the following issues: i) item 2b of the petition must be completed. ii) item 3h(3) or (4) must be checked. iii) item 5a(2) must be completed. iv) The required language "under penalty of perjury" is missing in Attachment 2.
